title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

synopsis: Lee Seon-Ho was falsely accused of parricide crime for murdering his own father. He lived through each day without being able to die. One day, Seon-Ho was approached by a mysterious old man and offered a desired deal that he could never refuse… (Source: Naver, translated)

synopsis: "May I never be born again." Trying to throw himself off the roof of the school is Ayumu, a boy who lived an ordinary junior high school life until half a year ago. What pushed him to this point? And what is the true ending that awaits...?

title: Zoufu no Hanataba
synopsis: The story begins when middle schooler Ryuunosuke visits his grandmother's house on an island. As Ryuunosuke walks past the stairs leading to the second floor, a strange, plant-like thing extends down from above. Intrigued, Ryuunosuke tries to climb the stairs, but his uncle stops him with an uncharacteristically grim facial expression, saying, “What are you doing?” and “You'd better not go up there.” That night, however, Ryuunosuke's curiosity drives him to go upstairs after all... (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
synopsis: An ordinary family that loves cats. One day, the whole Tanaka family died during a major earthquake. When they woke up, they were reincarnated as the Stuart family, a noble family from another world. Though everyone is dressed in the Western style, they have memories of their previous Japanese lives. Even though they’re confused, they’ve gotten used to living in another world.

title: Chie Aru Koibito
synopsis: The protagonists of "Chie Aru Koibito," Ushidome-kun and Shirakaba-san, are both intelligent class representatives who judge things rationally. Even though their classmates extol the two as a perfect match, Shirakaba-san declares that she "doesn't have even a second to lose herself in love." Ushidome-kun is honestly shocked by this, but he also appeals that he is "not in a state to fall in love," which upsets Shirakaba-san. They are both too conscious of each other, and the rationality of the two explosive people is on the verge of collapse. This is the love story of a male and female honor student who cannot be honest with each other and are tormented by their own worldly desires. (Source: Natalie, translated)

synopsis: That woman is "Yotaka." Once famous in the underworld as the strongest assassin, she is now a 33-year-old (and very unlucky) drug addict and alcoholic. She's enjoying her unemployed life in a rundown apartment. ♪ With her mind and body completely slack, Yotaka receives an invitation from her assassin friend, "Kohai," to return to active duty...!! Will she return to the battlefield once again?! Yotaka!!! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: My Wandering Warrior Existence
titleNative: 迷走戦士・永田カビ
synonyms: Diario di una guerriera single - Il mio matrimonio con me stessa
synopsis: The newest diary manga from the Harvey Award-winning creator of My Lesbian Experience with Loneliness. Nagata Kabi’s groundbreaking autobiographical work has captivated audiences around the globe, starting with the viral online comic about identity that would become the graphic novel My Lesbian Experience with Loneliness . Readers from all backgrounds have been moved by the author’s ability to capture complex emotions through her art and text, giving insight into feelings they may have struggled to articulate themselves. Nagata Kabi’s memoirs, including the Eisner-nominated My Solo Exchange Diary and new release My Alcoholic Escape From Reality , have explored themes of physical and mental illness, sex and sexuality, family, and independence. Follow the newest installment of this trailblazing series with My Wandering Warrior Existence , Nagata Kabi’s exploration of longing for love and marriage. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Neoman Boindan Mariya
synonyms: You’re the Only One I Can See
synopsis: Following the advice of his imaginary friend Jason, who told him, "Treat all girls like stones," Park Jin-yong starts seeing every girl as a stone. But then Sunwoo, a female student who doesn’t look like a stone, appears before him, and for the first time in five years, the sight of a girl’s face sends Jinyong’s happy little circuits into overdrive... (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Tuojiang
synonyms: เอาตัวรอดจากรัชทายาทคลั่งรัก
synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: The War of Greedy Witches
titleRomaji: Majo Taisen: 32-nin no Isai no Majo wa Koroshiau
titleNative: 魔女大戦 32人の異才の魔女は殺し合う
synonyms: มหาสงคราม 32 แม่มด
Witches war: La gran guerra entre brujas
synopsis: Joan of Arc, the hero who saved France, was sentenced to be burned at the stake. But at the moment of her death, a demon sent her to another world. There, she found 32 women from across history, known as “witches.” With the addition of the final witch, Joan of Arc, Walpurgis Night begins: Only one witch can survive, and have her wish granted! (Source: Comikey)

title: Ending Maker
synonyms: エンディングメーカー
synopsis: After "outboxer009" wakes up in the body of Jude Bayer from Legend of Heroes 2, he soon discovers that his rival "sandstorm" has also entered the game world as Cordelia Chace. These top-two-ranked old pros come to realize that navigating this game world is much harder than just pointing and clicking. With the apocalyptic conclusion of the game looming before them, they'll have to combine his quick wit, her foul mouth, and both their gamer mindsets to make a new, less cataclysmic ending. (Source: Tapas, edited)
